modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Nuventive through myUSD or Academics tab.

full_description_text: User attempts to access Nuventive via quick-link at myUSD. The page fails to load completely. User also tried the link in the Academics tab with no success. There is uncertainty if Nuventive is down or experiencing issues.

description: User attempts to access Nuventive via quick-link at myUSD. The page fails to load completely. User also tried the link in the Academics tab with no success. There is uncertainty if Nuventive is down or experiencing issues.
